page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 4 dedicated physical cores, 4 vCPUs, and 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance in the lower performance tiers. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests score 1105.28 and 2929.74 respectively, both falling into the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with read-only large block operations measured at 21.24 GB/sec (bottom 10%) and write large block operations at 18.69 GB/sec. Cryptographic and compression tasks show similar limitations, with single-threaded gzip compression registering at 19.06 GB/sec and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 14.61 GB/sec.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation but modest benchmark scores, the ecs.sn2.large offers a stable but lower-tier resource profile. It is suitable for workloads that require predictable CPU access without high-performance demands, such as lightweight static web serving (benchmarked at 2.44 GB/sec), small-scale Redis caching (achieving 2.86 million SET operations per second), basic database operations, and development environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, it provides 16.0 GB of RAM (4.0 GB per core), 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data indicates modest performance, with CPU and memory bandwidth metrics generally falling into the bottom 10% to 25% of tested servers. For example, stress-ng multi-core CPU performance is recorded at 2929.74, and static web serving throughput reaches 2.44 GB/sec. This instance is best suited for predictable but low-intensity workloads, such as development environments, basic database operations, lightweight Redis caching, and low-traffic web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.large is a general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and a 1 Gbps network baseline, suitable for predictable, low-intensity workloads.

tagline: A dedicated virtual machine offering balanced compute and memory resources designed for predictable and stable entry level workloads.
